server_paths_note: All paths below are resolved from env vars at runtime. No absolute local paths.
side_inputs_note: All required data (FixationMaps, PerSubjectFixations, OBJ meshes) are part of the published dataset. No extra scp transfer needed for these in-repo scripts.

transform_recipe.note: Recipe is anchored to the 3DVA Blender render script and JSON: origin is moved to bbox center before scaling, camera z-offset is 0.5, start yaw is 0, and scale/FOV come from JSON. A static OBJ import-axis correction is supported in code but is not yet validated as a dataset-wide default. `bunny` currently uses `rotX=-70` and `FOV=34.0` as the best local preview match from contour-based search on frame 0.

full_run_note: 32 models total; pilot must pass before full run.
view_note: Evaluate all three views in full run; pilot may start with view 300 only.

metrics.note: Compute full metric set first; filter at analysis stage.

benchmark_validity_rules: Do not compare vertex-level predictions directly against face-level GT.
3DVA and MeshMamba are separate benchmark tracks.
Fix geometry and camera placement before drawing conclusions from metrics.

parallelism.note: Increase only after checking host load in htop. No nested parallelism.
